text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to feel a little hungry while out one day
with Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wanna grab some food? What're ya in the mood
for?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh, ya just leavin' it up to me? Are ya sure
you're fine with anythin'?
choice_data_list: Yeah... as long as it fills me up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see. Anythin' is fine then, huh...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, that makes things more interestin'! I just had
a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's spice things up. Whaddya say to drawin' lots
to decide where we go eat?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! Let's find some paper to fold.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sweet! That oughta do it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and draw one. Once ya unfold it, you'll
see the restaurant's name.
choice_data_list: By the way, what kind of places are on the list?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Curious, are we? I was just 'bout to tell ya.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
First on the list is Hyper Mala Blackout. They're
famous in the neighborhood for their super spicy
hot pot.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Crack the lid off the pot of hell, and
witness the sea of crimson flames. One bite and
you'll breathe fire for three days!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But, don't go writin' the others off just yet.
There's also Supersize Dojo, the place where
competitive eaters clash each day, and leavin'
food uneaten is a cardinal sin.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Then, there's Survival Instinct, where they
specialize in bug cuisine. You'll need courage if
you're gonna try this one, though. I've written
down tons more interestin' places, too! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ah yeah, I almost forgot! There's also the
long-standin' rice ball joint Prosperity Hut. Their
inari sushi is to die for!
choice_data_list: That last one sounds the best...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh, we agreed to let the gods decide this
one. Go on and make your draw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I said I was up for anything, I didn't expect
this... I cross my fingers in hopes of drawing the
last mentioned restaurant and nervously pull a
folded sheet.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya know? It's the Prosperity Hut! I gotta
say, luck is really on your side!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. That settles it, let's head there now! I
know some nice scenic spots nearby too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we make our way over to the restaurant.
After purchasing our inari sushi, Inari One leads
me to her recommended spot.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, yeah! This is the good stuff! I can't get
enough of this salty-sweet flavor!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, Trainer? Doesn't it taste better
knowin' you hit the jackpot in the draw?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I immediately nod in agreement, which sets Inari
off snickering.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, I'm sorry, Trainer. It was me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The raffle we made... Well, I kinda only put the
rice ball restaurant in.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, ya said anythin' was fine. I couldn't help
but yank your chain a li'l bit.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But now, doesn't it feel even better to be eatin'
tasty food in front of a fine view like this?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But now, doesn't it feel even better to be eatin'
tasty food in front of a fine view like this?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya can't take even a single meal for granted. It's
important to take care of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The world's a harsh place, after all. Things won't
always go the way ya planned.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's why ya gotta keep a cool head. Whatever
life throws at ya, stand tall and enjoy the ride!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One talks while gazing at the sky. Maybe
this little stunt is her way of sharing her Edo spirit
with me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oops, there I go ramblin' on. Well anyway, havin'
that kind of mindset is what I mean when I talk
about style and class.
choice_data_list: I'd like to learn your classy ways.
I'd like to learn your classy ways.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oops, there I go ramblin' on. Well anyway, havin'
that kind of mindset is what I mean when I talk
about style and class.
choice_data_list: Maybe someday I can be a class act too.
Maybe someday I can be a class act too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, ya don't needa work too hard at it. Ya got a
role model standing right next to ya!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That said, don't expect me to keep shootin' my
mouth off all the time. Long explanations are the
epitome of tacky.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: At the end of the day, just follow my lead!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey! Didja not listen to a word I said?! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well, it's fine. I was goofin' around with ya too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Enjoy the food to your heart's content. Heh heh.
